mission: Educate developers and enthusiasts about autonomous AI agents, decentralized systems, and the future of self-sovereign computing
strategy: Focus on: (1) Tutorials and guides for building with Jinn, (2) Technical deep-dives on agent architecture, (3) Industry analysis of AI agent ecosystems, (4) Case studies of autonomous workstreams. Target audience: Web3 developers, AI researchers, and crypto enthusiasts interested in autonomous systems.
